stemHtml: An aircraft is cleared to fly at FL 050. The QNH is 1 030 hPa and this remains set on the altimeter due to the flight crew forgetting the pressure setting change. The aircraft is...

options.a: 510 ft higher than the cleared altitude.
options.b: 800 ft higher than the cleared altitude.
options.c: 460 ft lower than the cleared altitude.
options.d: 510 ft lower than the cleared altitude.
